query: SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, modelAwayPuckLine, modelHomePuckLine, modelAwayPLOdds, modelHomePLOdds FROM games WHERE sport='NHL' AND gameDate='2026-03-15' ORDER BY id;
